text:
stephen     2011-06-21 01:46:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/octave-forge-octclip Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - New port math/octave-forge-octclip
  
  This is octclip.
  
  This package allows to do boolean operations with polygons using the
  Greiner-Hormann algorithm.
  
  The octave-forge package is the result of The GNU Octave Repositry project,
  which is intended to be a central location for custom scripts, functions and
  extensions for GNU Octave. contains the source for all the functions plus
  build and install scripts.
  
  WWW: http://octave.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/157969
  Submitted by:   stephen
  Approved by:    maho (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.704     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-octclip/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-octclip/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/math/octave-forge-octclip/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/math/octave-forge-octclip/pkg-plist (new)
